skills.name: Arcane Energy
skills.description: Applies the Arcane Energy buff to you and your party members. The buff records your current SP and STA, and if the amount of SP and STA consumed during the buff is higher than the one recorded, at the end of the buff all the SP and STA you consumed are restored.
skills.effect_text:
[Arcane Energy: Absorption] Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.3 seconds
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Counter Spell
skills.description: Removes enemy magic circles nearby, and summons another magic circle that reduces the damage taken from enemy magic attacks.
skills.effect_text:
Decrease Magic Damage by CaptionRatio %
[Counter Spell: Punisher] Skill factor: SkillFactor %
[Counter Spell: Punisher] targets: CaptionRatio2
Removes nearby enemy's magic circle
Magic Circle Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Prophecy
skills.description: Makes nearby party members immune to all removable debuffs temporarily.
skills.effect_text:
Duration: CaptionTime seconds
[Prophecy: Shock] Skill factor: SkillFactor %
[Prophecy: Shock] targets: CaptionRatio2
Maximum Level: 1

skills.name: Gender Switch
skills.description: Set up a shop that can change a character's gender. 'Mirror of Truth'x1 is required to perform each gender change.
skills.effect_text:
Discover more
Respiratory Conditions
Doll
Maps
Maximum Level: 1

skills.name: Foretell
skills.description: Summons a magic circle that interferes with the enemy attacks. Reduces damage received from enemies while inside the magic circle.
skills.effect_text:
Damage Taken - CaptionRatio %
Magic Circle Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Twist of Fate
skills.description: Deal a fixed amount of damage to the selected target based on its maximum HP. The target gradually recovers HP, with the total amount recovered matching double the amount lost by the attack. Only half of the damage is applied to boss monsters, and the skill does not apply to field boss monsters. Cannot be used inside the Guild Hangout.
skills.effect_text:
Reduces CaptionRatio % - CaptionRatio2 % of maximum HP
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Divine Might
skills.description: Temporarily increases the skill levels of you and your party members by 1.

attributes.name: Arcane Energy: Duration
attributes.description: * Increases the duration of [Arcane Energy] by 1 second per attribute level

attributes.name: Counter Spell: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increase the effect of [Counter Spell] that decreases magic damage by 0.5% per attribute level

* Increases skill factor of [Counter Spell: Punisher] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Counter Spell: Duration
attributes.description: * Increases the duration of [Counter Spell] by 1 second per attribute level

attributes.name: Foretell: Threat
attributes.description:
* Allies within the range of [Foretell] apply 10% less threat per attribute level to enemies

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Divine Might: Increase Duration
attributes.description:
* Duration of [Divine Might] increases by 1 second per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Twist of Fate: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Decreases [Twist of Fate]'s total amount of HP recovered by 0.5% per attribute level

* -10% added decrease at maximum level

attributes.name: Foretell: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases damage reduced using [Foretell] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level.

attributes.name: [Arts] Divine Might: Ill Omen
attributes.description:
* The effect of [Divine Might] only applies to the enemy (up to 5), skill level of enemy under [Divine Might] is applied lv.1 (Effect is applied with renewed skill level during some buff)

* Duration is fixed to 10 seconds

attributes.name: [Arts] Foretell: Ominous Prophecy
attributes.description:
* Changes [Foretell] to magic circle which applies to the enemy

* Decreases damage received from the enemy by [skill level * 2.5]%

attributes.name: Arcane Energy: Absorption Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases skill factor of [Arcane Energy: Absorption] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Prophecy: Shock Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases skill factor of [Prophecy: Shock] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Arcane Energy: Absorption Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Arcane Energy: Absorption] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Prophecy: Shock: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Prophecy: Shock] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Arcane Energy: Absorption
attributes.description:
* Removes the original effect of [Arcane Energy]

* Decrease Cooldown of [Arcane Energy] by 30 seconds

* Apply debuff that damages the target every 2 seconds when casting [Arcane Energy]

* Ally attacking the target under debuff recovers a certain amount of SP(number of SP recovery: 5 times)

* [Arcane Energy: Absorption] debuff is not transferred to Pandemic

attributes.name: Counter Spell: Punisher
attributes.description:
* Removes the effect of [Counter Spell] magic circle that decreases magic damage

* Decrease Cooldown of [Counter Spell] by 10 seconds

* [Counter Spell] magic circle gives damage to the enemy by 1 second

* Increase [Counter Spell] magic circle range and decrease the duration

attributes.name: Prophecy: Shock
attributes.description:
* Removes original function of [Prophecy]

* Cooldown of [Prophecy] decreases by 30 seconds

* Damage the enemy in range and removes 1 removable buff when casting [Prophecy]

attributes.name: [Arts] Counter Spell: Punisher Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Counter Spell: Punisher] by 1.25% per attribute level
